_comment: npm baseline — do not delete. Captured before any Rust P2P wiring hits beta. Referenced by Phase 7 T-74 perf gate (±10% tolerance). See bead mxdx-awe.29.

topology_local_tuwunel._comment: Pure npm path against local tuwunel instance, loopback WebRTC data channel between two WasmMatrixClient instances.

topology_single_hs_ca1_beta._comment: npm path against live beta server ca1-beta.mxdx.dev. Real network RTT, not loopback.

topology_federated_ca1_ca2.reason: perf-terminal.test.js does not currently exercise a ca1↔ca2 federated topology. Single-HS P2P numbers above use loopback WebRTC against local tuwunel; the beta section uses ca1 only.
topology_federated_ca1_ca2.follow_up_description: Add federated (ca1↔ca2) perf topology to perf-terminal.test.js (or a sibling perf-terminal-federated.test.js). Must run on beta. Capture same 6 metrics + HS-to-HS RTT. Used by T-74 rust-p2p-beta-perf.test.js as the federated comparison baseline.

six_metrics_status._comment: The storm spec §5.5 defines 6 perf metrics. Mapping from this baseline:
six_metrics_status.4_setup_time: not-captured — test does not time setup phase separately

notes: Captured via standard 'node --test packages/e2e-tests/tests/perf-terminal.test.js'. The test produces a single perf-terminal.html and prints metrics to stdout. The JSON above is a manual transcription of stdout + contextual annotations. Phase 7 T-74 compares Rust perf against these numbers with ±10% tolerance. A federated-topology addition and a setup-time metric are filed as Phase-7 follow-ups.
